title: Some More Enchantments
description: A datapack/mod that adds new enchantments
body:
Some More Enchantments adds ten new enchantments with more to come. These enchantments are all fully integrated into the game so you can find them in the enchanting table and on enchanted books.

The current enchantments are:

**Raiders Bane**:

- Weapon enchantment that deals extra damage to raid mobs (Pillagers, ravagers, etc.)
- Incompatible with Sharpness, Smite, and Bane of Arthropods
- Max level is 5

**Swiftness**:

- Boots enchantment that grants a speed boost when worn
- Incombatible with Depth Strider and Frost Walker
- Max level is three

**Withered**:

- Weapon enchantment that gives hit entities the wither effect
- Max level is three

**Levitator**:

- Weapon enchantment that gives hit entities the levitation effect
- Max level is three

**Reach**:

- Tool enchantment that increases block reach distance
- Max level is five
  
**Light Footed**:

- Treasure enchantment that increases step height by one
- Only one level
  
**Health Boost**:

- Treasure, chestplate exclusive enchantment that increases max health by two hearts per level
- Max level is five
- Very rare

**Gravity**:

- Treasure, leggings exclusive enchantment that decreases gravity and fall damage per level
- Max level is four
- Completely negates fall damage at level 4

**Burning Thorns**:

- Chance to set attackers on fire
- Max level is three

**Leech**:

- Chance to regenerate health on attack
- Chance increases with level
- Max level is three

**Swifter Slashes**:

- Increases attack speed by 0.1 per level
- Max level is three

**Ashen**:

- Deals extra damage to entities on fire
- Max level is three

**Burden**:

- Boot's exlusive curse that decreases movement speed

**Encumberment**:

- Weapon exlusive curse that decreases attack speed
- Max level is three

**Leaping**:

- Boots enchantment that increases jump height
- Max level is three

**Skater**:

- Increases movement speed on ice at the cost of durability
- Very powerful when combined with Frost Walker
- Max level is three

**Cowardly**:

- Leggings enchantment that gives a chance to receive a speed boost when damage is taken
- Max level is three

**Greater Enchantments**

- More powerful versions of their base enchantment
- They are incompatible with the base version
- Greater versions exist for Sharpness, Power, Efficiency, Lure, and Mending
